      step: 1

    second_buffer_offset: 0

    alternate_limit_loop_id: 0

    base_address: 2
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1

      end: 44

dma_op {
  opcode: WIDE_TO_NARROW
  read_tensor_traversal {
    base_address: 0
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: true
    }
    counter {
      end: 10
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    double_buffer_loop: 1
    second_buffer_offset: 1
    initialize_in_pong_state: false
    alternate_inner_limit: 0
    alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
  }
  write_tensor_traversal {
    base_address: 0
    counter {
      end: 49
      step: 1
      mask: true
    }
    counter {
      end: 13
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false

    sync_producer {
      increment: true
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 0

    double_buffer_loop: 1
    second_buffer_offset: 64
    initialize_in_pong_state: false
    alternate_inner_limit: 53
    alternate_limit_loop_id: 1

  read_sync_watchers {
    sync_flag_id {
      tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_READ_A
    }
    sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
    initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
    wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
    sync_wait_valid: true
    stall_ttu_id: 0
  }
  write_sync_watchers {
    sync_flag_id {
      tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_ACTIVATION_WRITE
    }
    sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
    initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 65535
    wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
    sync_wait_valid: true
    stall_ttu_id: 1

  narrow_wide {
    transpose: false
    double_operand_mode: false
    wide_memory_load_store_loop_id: 3
    is_scaling_factor_bias: false

    }

    non_linear_offset: 0
    use_scales: false

    even_odd_function: false

PC = 00384 (0x00180) 40 09 00 10 00 f0 00 88 ff 07 00 c4 ff 03 00 02 00 00 00 00 00 40 06 00 80 00 80 00 00 00 00 00
pop_input {
  input_fifo_select: PARAMETER
  tensor_traversal {
    base_address: 0
    counter {
      end: 15
      step: 1
      mask: true
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1
      mask: false
    }
    counter {
      end: 0
      step: 1

    alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
  }
  write_sync_watchers {
    sync_flag_id {
      tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_WRITE

    sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
    initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 65535
    wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
    sync_wait_valid: true
    stall_ttu_id: 1
  }
  use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
  narrow_wide {
    transpose: false
    double_operand_mode: false
    wide_memory_load_store_loop_id: 3
  }
}
